title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TNT India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TNT India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TNT India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About TNT India:
TNT India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TNT India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
